{{Quote|Nick told me it was Kar Vastor who persuaded the ULF to leave the corpses in the jungle. To make the scene so gruesome that I'd be sure to come here to investigate. To leave dead children—their own dead children—to the jacunas and the screw maggots and the black stinking carrion flies so full of blood they can only waddle across rotting flesh—Stop. I have to stop. Stop talking about this. Stop thinking about it.|Mace Windu, in his personal journal|<ref name="Shatter" />}}
'''Screw maggots''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Diet/Legends|scavengers]] who lived in the [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].<ref name="Shatter" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] came to the planet to investigate a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] depicting a [[Death/Legends|slaughtered]] group of [[Balawai|jungle prospectors]] and a recording that connected his former [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], a [[Chalactan/Legends|Chalactan]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] named [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]], to their deaths. Windu later learned that Billaba had worked with [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] leader [[Kar Vastor]] to stage the scene so that Windu would come to the planet looking for her.<ref name="Shatter" />

The Jedi wrote in his [[The Private Journals of Mace Windu|journal]] wondering what kind of man could convince his followers to leave the bodies of civilians, especially the women and children, to be consumed by the likes of screw [[Maggot/Legends|maggots]] and other scavengers such as [[jacuna]]s and [[Carrion fly|carrion flies]]. He found the idea revolting and quickly moved on in his thoughts.<ref name="Shatter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The screw maggot was mentioned in the [[2003]] novel [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], written by [[Matthew Stover]].<ref name="Shatter" />

*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
